title: 3 PCS Dish Brushes for Washing Up,Durable Bristle Long Handle Washing Up Brush Ideal for Deep Cleaning Kitchen and Sink Red Yellow Blue
features: Color Coded Convenience: This set includes one red, one yellow, and one blue washing up brush, each measuring 1.38in x 9.06in / 3.5cm x 23cm. The color coding helps in organizing tasks or assigning brushes to different family members.

Extended Reach: Designed with an extended handle, these long handled scrubbing brush tools make it easier to clean hard-to-reach areas inside pots, pans, and other deep kitchenware without straining your hands or back.

Versatile Cleaning: These washing up brush options are not only suitable for dishes but can also be used for cleaning various kitchen surfaces such as countertops, sinks, and stovetops, making them highly versatile.
High Quality Material: Dense yet flexible dish brush bristles lift grime gently.

Enhanced Grip Design: The handles of these long handled scrubbing brush tools are ergonomically designed to provide a comfortable grip even when wet. This design ensures better control and reduces hand fatigue during prolonged use.
